name: King Aurelion Veyrath IX
title: The Tide King
quote: Order is not cruelty. It is mercy given structure.
publicDescription: The beloved ruler of Atlantis and protector of the Deep Realm. Most citizens view him as wise, noble, and necessary.
dmSecret: Aurelion values stability over truth. He does not view himself as a tyrant, but he allows investigations, records, and citizens to disappear when he believes the truth would endanger Atlantis.
currentNotes: His speech after Nella's death should make the players understand why Atlantis loves him.

name: Captain Thalorin Tideborn
title: Captain of the Tidewardens
quote: A Tidewarden's duty is not to the throne. It is to the people sleeping safely because you stood watch.
publicDescription: A respected and protective Tidewarden captain who believes recruits are forged through discipline, honesty, and courage.
dmSecret: Thalorin has noticed missing reports, suspicious orders, and investigations that vanish. He remains loyal to Atlantis, but he is beginning to question whether loyalty and obedience are the same thing.
currentNotes: Leads the Session 3 mission briefing and reacts strongly when Lyra is injured.

name: Commander Vaeloria Stormcurrent
title: Commander of the Tidewarden Academy
quote: Atlantis is not protected by walls. It is protected by the people willing to stand upon them.
publicDescription: A disciplined and respected commander who demands excellence from every recruit beneath her command.
dmSecret: Vaeloria knows some investigations disappear and some records are sealed, but she does not yet understand the full conspiracy.

name: Sergeant Thalric Tideborn
title: Academy Sergeant
quote: If you're breathing, you're still learning. If you're not breathing, paperwork gets involved.
publicDescription: A gruff veteran instructor who yells like he hates everyone and protects recruits like they are his children.
dmSecret: Fifteen years ago, Thalric lost an entire recruit squad during a mission gone wrong. He believes the official report was a lie.
currentNotes: Useful for humor and emotional veteran wisdom.

name: Lieutenant Neros Wavecrest
title: Administrative Officer
quote: Every report tells a story. Most people simply forget to read it.
publicDescription: A friendly and sharp administrative officer who remembers names, records, and inconsistencies others miss.
dmSecret: Neros has found altered academy records and missing reports. Someone has already noticed his questions.
currentNotes: A strong early ally for investigation scenes.

name: Lyra Moonreef
title: Tidewarden Recruit
quote: You're hiding something. I don't know what it is yet. But I will.
publicDescription: A quiet, empathetic, and perceptive Water Genasi recruit who notices emotions others try to hide.
dmSecret: Lyra is not soul-swapped. She is truly Atlantean. She becomes Evaie's love interest after Evaie wakes in Atlantis. During Session 3, Lyra is critically injured and reveals that the ambushers knew the mission was coming.
currentNotes: In Session 3, she is wounded protecting another recruit. Her whispered clue is: 'Someone told them.'

name: Cassia Pearlfin
title: Squad Nine Leader
quote: Competence isn't arrogance if you're right.
publicDescription: A confident, tactical, and ambitious recruit expected by many to become a captain one day.
dmSecret: Cassia genuinely believes strong leadership is necessary for Atlantis to survive. The truth may either humble her or harden her.
currentNotes: Good choice for rivalry that can become respect.

name: Brakk Deepjaw
title: Tidewarden Recruit
quote: Best way to settle disagreement? First one unconscious loses.
publicDescription: A massive sharkfolk recruit who looks terrifying until he starts talking and becomes somehow worse because he is aggressively friendly.
dmSecret: Brakk's loyalty is simple and powerful. If the party earns his trust, he becomes one of their loudest defenders.
currentNotes: Use him to break tension before emotional scenes.

name: Varko Tidewatch
title: Tidewarden Recruit
publicDescription: A calm and observant Locathah recruit who notices patterns, inconsistencies, and people pretending to be something they are not.
dmSecret: Varko notices the player characters' strange behavior early but chooses not to report it immediately.
currentNotes: He can become the first rival to quietly help the party.

name: Kella Tidehopper
title: Nella's Mother
quote: Mothers know when something is wrong.
publicDescription: A grieving mother whose daughter Nella died beneath the Drowned Ward.
dmSecret: Kella's instincts are right. Nella's death may have been accidental, but the official story hides what Nella found and why the area mattered.
currentNotes: Her grief should be heartbreaking but not helpless. She senses a cover-up.

name: Nella Tidehopper
title: The Child Who Dreamed of Becoming a Tidewarden
quote: When I grow up, I'm going to be a Tidewarden.
publicDescription: A curious Atlantean child who loved asking questions, feeding fish, collecting shells, and dreaming about becoming a Tidewarden.
dmSecret: Nella accidentally found something connected to the larger conspiracy before her death. Her death was not murder, but the cover-up around it matters.
currentNotes: Her belongings should include a shell necklace, whale shark sketch, tiny guard toy, and journal.
